testcase.name: test_access_token_requires_auth

failure.message: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/videos/d108814f-cf70-43ee-b3e2-a2269c84aa63/access-token': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/videos/d108814f-cf70-43ee-b3e2-a2269c84aa63/access-token?

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_video_routes.py:23: in test_access_token_requires_auth r = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/videos/{EXISTING_VIDEO_ID}/access-token") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:73: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:59: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:575: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:484: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:367: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:438: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/videos/d108814f-cf70-43ee-b3e2-a2269c84aa63/access-token': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/videos/d108814f-cf70-43ee-b3e2-a2269c84aa63/access-token?

testcase.name: test_access_token_404_for_unknown_video

failure.message: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/videos/not-a-real-video-id/access-token': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/videos/not-a-real-video-id/access-token?

Perhaps you meant https:///api/videos/not-a-real-video-id/access-token?
